understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by positioning all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the engine reports WIN, and to do so within the limited step budget for the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions consisted of directional moves for the currently selected piece and CLICKs that targeted a specific grid coordinate to either select or directly move/teleport the selected piece to that coordinate if allowed by the level rules; attempts to move into blocked tiles (walls/obstacles/invalid squares) or otherwise illegal targets resulted in no movement. With multiple pieces/goals, correct selection/placement order mattered because every goal needed to be occupied simultaneously before steps ran out.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 level by positioning all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time so the engine reports WIN, and to do so within the limited step budget for the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions consisted of directional moves for the currently selected piece and CLICKs that targeted a specific grid coordinate to either select or directly move/teleport the selected piece to that coordinate if allowed by the level rules; attempts to move into blocked tiles (walls/obstacles/invalid squares) or otherwise illegal targets resulted in no movement. With multiple pieces/goals, correct selection/placement order mattered because every goal needed to be occupied simultaneously before steps ran out.
